negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_7bd1acde-f709-49a6-977d-80ea53dce0d4
prompt: A vibrant and lively musical performance takes place in a vintage red open-top car adorned with detailed gray metallic accents, light brown boxes, and black instrument cases with stickers. The ensemble consists of four musicians and a charismatic female lead vocalist standing prominently on the vehicle. The lead vocalist, dressed in a bright orange dress with yellow sleeves and triangles on the bottom, matching yellow gloves, red sunglasses, and an orange headband with a decorative piece, sings into a vintage microphone. To her left, a redheaded musician plays a wooden double bass, dressed in a blue skirt, a light blue blouse with white stripes, a dark diamond-patterned vest, and a pink beret. Seated behind the vocalist to her right, a drummer, wearing a dark purple beret and vest, black sunglasses, a green shirt with white accents, and a yellow tie, plays a compact drum set. A saxophonist sits at the rear left, wearing a patterned, pink-toned hat, dark sunglasses, a squared green vest, a blue shirt with white accents, and purple trousers, while a trumpeter sits to the rear right, clad in a cream hat with a purple line and ribbon, a purple vest, a white shirt, an orange tie, and blue pants.  The performance draws a diverse crowd of onlookers—adults and children in casual hats, some gathered near the camera, others scattered in the background, with one individual in dark attire and a blue shirt trailing the car. The setting is rich with classic architecture, pastel-colored buildings with art deco designs, and vintage storefronts, evoking an early-to-mid 20th-century urban atmosphere, possibly in a theme park. The backdrop features blue skies with painted clouds blending into the vintage facades, contrasting with the clear blue sky and green trees lit by the sunlight of the open setting of the real-world surroundings. The camera tracks and zooms in on the vehicle's left profile from different angles as it moves and turns down the street, capturing the dynamic energy of the performance and the lively audience.
